roa.docketEntryComment: PROBATION TRANSFER TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY SENT
APD'S PC1203,9 TRANSFER OUT (TO CONTRA COSTA CO) FILED

/CAL: APD 1203,9PC  MOTION TO TRANSFER PROBATION FROM SAN FRANCISCO  COUNTYTO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY/MO GRTD/CTORD: PROBATION IS TRANSFERRED FROM SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY/X:COURT ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED,/

/CAL: PTC/X: DA ORALLY AMENDS INFORMATINO TO ADD COUNT 7, PC 245(A)(4) - FELONY/FAWA/IRR/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:   7/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES: 07-22-19/PPRFCUST/SAORD/SA1: JESUS PADILLA ORELLANA/SA1: RICARDO AVILEZBAIAN/REMA/ARBUCKLE//CONTD: SENTENCING/DOP/

/CAL:TO SET JURY TRIAL, ACM PROGRESS REPORT RE ANGER MANAGEMENT/INTC/X:ACMMODIFIED AS FOLLOWS-REPORT 2 TIMES PER WEEK BY PHONE, ATTEND CLASS ONCE PER WEEK (ANGER MANAGEMENT)/CONTD:SETTING JURY TRIAL/DOP/

/CAL:TRIAL & BENCH WARRANT STAY FROM 07-09-18 (FTA PTC IN S23)/INTC/BWSTAY:07-09-18/GTW/VD:TRIAL AND LAST DAY OF 08-03-18/CTORD:ACM REQUIREMENTS MODIFED AS FOLLOWS:/X:DEFENDANT SHALL REPORT TO ACM FOUR TIMES PER WEEK BY PHONE AND ATTEND ONE WEEKLY ANGER MANAGEMENT SESSION (AFTER WORK HOURS) AS DIRECTED BY ACM,/ /DEF:IS ADMONISHED TO COMPLY WITH ACM REQUIREMENTS/CONTD:ACM PROGRESS REPORT, PRETRIAL CONFERENCE AND TO SET JURY TRIAL/DOP/

/CAL: PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/LDTR: 08-03-18/X: COURT IS IN RECEIPT OF A NEGATIVE ACM REPORT/CONTD PROC RE BW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND  STAYED TO 07-20-18, RETURNABLE TO D22/X: BAIL SET AT $75,000/
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAW/DEFTARR/NTW/LDTR: 08-03-18/987,2/TE: 2 WEEKS/CONTD: PRETRIAL CONFERENCE ON 07-09-18 AND TRIAL ON 07-20-18/DOP/

/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/INTC/WITEXCL:DEFENSE/WIT SWORN DA: NICOLE HICKS, SFPD OFFICER/WIT SWORN DA: JOHN TYNES, SFPD OFFICER/X: DEFENSE ORAL 17(B) MOTION IS DENIED/HTA1:1, 2, 4, AND 5/X: MISDEMEANOR COUNTS 3 AND 6 ARECERTIFIED/DEF:REMAINS ON ACM/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW60/LDPX:06-04-18/987,2/ACM/SAORD/SA1:JESUS PADILLA-ORELLANA & RICARDO AVILEZBAIAN/SAORD3/SA2:CAT CLUB- 1190 FOLSOM STREET, SF CA/CTORD:ASCONDITIONS OF RELEASE ON ACM, DEFENDANT SHALL NOT POSSESS ANY WEAPONS AND DEFENDANT IS SUBJECT TO A WARRANTLESS SEARCH CONDITION, AS TO DEFENDANT'S PERSON, PROPERTY, PREMISES AND VEHICLE, ANY TIME OF THE DAY OR NIGHT, WITH ORWITHOUT PROBABLE CAUSE, BY ANY PEACE, PAROLE OR PROBATION OFFICER,/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
